message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle italic skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor #000000 skinparam classFontColor #000000 skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle normal skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #000000 skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #E0E0E0 skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #000000 class "Collection" as Collection { } class "List" as List { } class "AbstractCollection" as AbstractCollection { } class "AbstractList" as AbstractList { } class "ArrayList" as ArrayList { Object[] elementData int a -- size() } class "TimeUnit" as TimeUnit { DAYS HOURS MINUTES } Collection <|-- List AbstractCollection <|-- Collection AbstractList <|-- AbstractCollection ArrayList <|-- AbstractList List <|-- AbstractList note right of Collection I end note note right of List I end note note right of AbstractCollection A end note note right of AbstractList A end note note right of ArrayList C end note note right of TimeUnit E end note @enduml
